# PHAssetCollectionType.smartAlbum

**Case**

A smart album whose contents update dynamically.

## Declaration

```swift
case smartAlbum
```

## Discussion

The Photos app displays built-in smart albums to group certain kinds of related assets (see [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionSubtype]).

## Constants

- **PHAssetCollectionType.album**: An album in the Photos app.
- **PHAssetCollectionType.moment**: A moment in the Photos app.
